mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HOMPI_GUEST_BOOK ( HOMPI_ID, GUEST_BOOK_CONTENT, REMARKS, INSERT_USER_ID, INSERT_DT, UPDATE_USER_ID, UPDATE_DT, SECRET_CHECK ) VALUES ( #{hompiId}, #{guestBookContent}, #{remarks}, #{insertUserId}, #{insertDt}, #{updateUserId}, #{updateDt}, #{secretCheck} )
mapper.select: SELECT v.GUEST_BOOK_ID, v.HOMPI_ID, v.GUEST_BOOK_CONTENT, v.REMARKS, v.INSERT_USER_ID, DATE_FORMAT(v.INSERT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS INSERT_DT, v.UPDATE_USER_ID, DATE_FORMAT(v.UPDATE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS UPDATE_DT, v.SECRET_CHECK, u.LOGIN_ID, u.NAME, h.OWNER_USER_ID FROM HOMPI_GUEST_BOOK v JOIN USER_BASIC u ON v.INSERT_USER_ID = u.USER_ID JOIN HOMPI h ON v.HOMPI_ID = h.HOMPI_ID WHERE v.HOMPI_ID = #{hompiId} ORDER BY v.INSERT_DT DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HOMPI_GUEST_BOOK WHERE HOMPI_ID = #{hompiId} AND ( (UPDATE_DT IS NOT NULL AND UPDATE_DT >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)) OR (UPDATE_DT IS NULL AND INSERT_DT >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)) )
